application.notes: Observation is aimed at ballet teachers; access is by sending a CV to the course email.

Applicants pass an audition — live group, online group, online individual, or by video. A video audition (8–12 min) must show: barre (tendu, fondu, grand battement); a centre adagio; a pirouette combination; small, medium and big jump combinations; two combinations on pointe; and an optional classical variation. Returning RMB students may be exempt.
